flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Florence-Darlington Technical College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (14.5% → 10.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florence-Darlington Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Florence-Darlington Technical College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4k → 3.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Florence-Darlington Technical College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (47.3% → 58.2%).
